The '''OrC-19 com-scan integrator console''' was a [[Com-scan]] [[Computer/Legends|computer]] system manufactured by [[MicroThrust Processors|MicroThrust]]. It was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] at [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] to monitor the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|attack]] and allow [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Rieekan]] to coordinate the ground defense and the evacuation of the [[Transport/Legends|transports]].<ref name="EGWT" />

{{Tech-stub}}
